title: Area Coverage Grid Block

fields.label: Area Coverage H2
fields.name: area_coverage_heading
fields.instructions: Main heading for the area coverage section.

fields.label: Area Coverage Paragraph
fields.name: area_coverage_description
fields.instructions: Intro copy below the heading. Links are supported.

fields.label: Areas
fields.name: area_coverage_items
fields.instructions: Add one area label per row.

sub_fields.label: Area Label
sub_fields.name: area_coverage_label
sub_fields.instructions: Use a line break if you want a second line, for example: Ashburn\n(Data Center Alley).

fields.label: CTA Link
fields.name: area_coverage_cta
fields.instructions: Optional button shown below the area list.

description: Fields for the Area Coverage Grid ACF block.
